hyperedges.label: Landing Page Section Pattern
hyperedges.rationale: All four sections are structural components of the Massage Frome Divi landing page shown in the comparison image, forming a complete conversion-oriented page layout pattern

hyperedges.label: Variable-First Builder: colorRef + variableRef + ET tokens → design-system-consistent Divi 5 JSON
Render-Safety Pipeline: validate.js + render-safety.js + verify-rendered.js → two-tier fault detection
DiviTheatre Integration: theatreAttrs() emits data-theatre JSON consumed by DiviTheatre plugin
Render-Safety Pipeline — generate → Tier1 lint → import → Tier2 live verify
Page generation pipeline — divi-builder.js + validate.js + Playwright gate
Taste + aesthetics + layout-patterns — tri-file design quality gate
Divi 5 module registration requires module.json + JSX component + PHP server in concert
DiviTheatre preset pipeline: core API + baked-state schema + preset authoring guide
LLM laziness research: empirical results + references + laziness README collectively define the phenomenon and remediation
LLM Laziness Root Causes Cluster
hyperedges.note: All four documents collectively explain the root causes of LLM truncation and laziness behavior

hyperedges.label: LLM Laziness Remediation Cluster
hyperedges.note: All five documents address techniques for preventing, mitigating, or overriding LLM truncation and lazy output behavior

hyperedges.label: Taste Skill UI Generation Skills Suite
hyperedges.note: All skills in the taste-skill plugin share the same anti-slop UI design philosophy and are registered together in llms.txt

hyperedges.label: wp-dev-tools bundles marketing + submission-check skills
wp-plugin-marketing 4-step workflow: MVC assets → .org listing → product website → prioritisation
DiviTheatre demo payload: sections + presets + global colors
Divi 5 page import pipeline: REST entry → PageImporter → GlobalPreset
Preset import lifecycle: import presets → persist via GlobalPreset.save_data() → clear CSS cache
End-to-end authoring pipeline: JS generator produces JSON → import.sh POSTs to REST API → RestApi dispatches import
Divi 5 layout build → validate → SEO meta pipeline
DiviTheatre attribute generation pipeline
REST import pipeline: RestApi → PageImporter → SeoWriter
validate.js: SEO + taste + ET-token checks
Preset import pipeline: JS builder registers → REST API receives → PHP imports
CSS cache invalidation: PresetManager::save_data triggers → PageImporter::clear_page_css_cache clears → et-cache files removed
Block emission: block() serialises → placeholder() wraps → PageImporter validates wp:divi/placeholder

nodes.label: Pet Rescue Landing Page Preview
nodes.notes: Divi 5 generated landing page for a pet rescue/adoption organisation. Hero section with headline 'Find your new best friend', subheadline about volunteer fosterers, stats (6 pets, 4 towns, 100% health checked), CTA buttons 'Browse all pets' and 'How adoption works'. Orange stat bar. 'Meet the animals' section with live Airtable embed. 'How adoption works' 3-step process (Fill in short form, Get your match, Bring them home). CTA footer 'Could you give one of them a home?' with 'Start an enquiry' button. Footer credits 'Westcountry Pet Rescue · Some data, live from Airtable · Powered by Group'.

nodes.label: Airtable Live Data Integration
nodes.notes: Page explicitly references Airtable for live pet listings and stat data. 'Meet the animals' section states pulled live from rescue database, no manual updates needed. Footer credits 'live from Airtable'. Demonstrates divi5-page-generator skill capability to embed Airtable data.

Divi 5 page import pipeline: REST entry → PageImporter → GlobalPreset
Preset import lifecycle: import presets → persist via GlobalPreset.save_data() → clear CSS cache
End-to-end authoring pipeline: JS generator produces JSON → import.sh POSTs to REST API → RestApi dispatches import
Divi 5 layout build → validate → SEO meta pipeline
DiviTheatre attribute generation pipeline
REST import pipeline: RestApi → PageImporter → SeoWriter
validate.js: SEO + taste + ET-token checks
Preset import pipeline: JS builder registers → REST API receives → PHP imports
CSS cache invalidation: PresetManager::save_data triggers → PageImporter::clear_page_css_cache clears → et-cache files removed
Block emission: block() serialises → placeholder() wraps → PageImporter validates wp:divi/placeholder
